name: o3-code
description: Repo-local reconstruction of the macOS Codex App.

scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm --filter @o3dotdev/code typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @o3dotdev/code smoke
scripts.lint: pnpm format:check && pnpm normalize:check && pnpm native-binaries:check && pnpm web-patches:check
scripts.test: node --test scripts/*.test.mjs && pnpm app-server-router:test && pnpm codex-app-resources:test && pnpm --filter @o3dotdev/code-bridge test && pnpm code:test
scripts.format: prettier --write AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CONTEXT.md CONTRIBUTING.md README.md .github/**/*.yml docs/**/*.md package.json packages/**/package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml scripts/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.js packages/**/*.ts "!packages/code/runtime/**" .prettierrc.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CONTEXT.md CONTRIBUTING.md README.md .github/**/*.yml docs/**/*.md package.json packages/**/package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml scripts/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.js packages/**/*.ts "!packages/code/runtime/**" .prettierrc.json
